articles.title: STABLE AUDIO 2.0
articles.summary: Stability AI has announced the next generation of its music generation model. Trained on properly licensed music, the model can generate up to 3 minutes of high-quality music. It also has audio-to-audio generation.

articles.title: OPERA ALLOWS USERS TO DOWNLOAD AND USE LLMS LOCALLY
articles.summary: Opera has launched a new feature that allows users to download and run large language models locally on their computers, with over 150 models from more than 50 families available.

articles.title: SCIENTISTS CREATE AI MODELS THAT CAN TALK TO EACH OTHER AND PASS ON SKILLS WITH LIMITED HUMAN INPUT
articles.summary: Researchers have developed an AI network where one AI can teach another to perform tasks using natural language processing, a capability not previously demonstrated. The system uses a model called S-Bert that allows AI to perform tasks given via instructions and then communicate that knowledge to another AI. This breakthrough has potential applications in robotics and could further understanding of human cognitive functions.

articles.title: REALKIE: FIVE NOVEL DATASETS FOR ENTERPRISE KEY INFORMATION EXTRACTION
articles.summary: Extracting information from datasets is critical for enterprise AI applications. These five new benchmark datasets can be used to measure general algorithmic performance for RAG applications.

articles.title: BOOSTING TRANSFORMER EFFICIENCY
articles.summary: Researchers have developed DiJiang, a new approach that transforms existing Transformers into leaner, faster models without the heavy burden of retraining.

articles.title: AUTONOMOUS DRIVING WITH WORLD-CENTRIC DIFFUSION TRANSFORMERS
articles.summary: This study introduces a new method for creating driving paths for autonomous vehicles that combines diffusion models and transformers in a system called "World-Centric Diffusion Transformer" (WcDT).

articles.title: LEARN TO FUTURE-PROOF YOUR GENAI STACK WITH ALLIE K MILLER AND OCTOAI'S LUIS CEZE
articles.summary: Watch this lively discussion amongst veteran insiders [11] and learn how AI Natives and sophisticated enterprises are building their GenAI stacks in their private environments. See what you can do to achieve efficiency, customization, and reliability. Learn more about

articles.title: 3D DETECTION FOR LARGE OBJECTS
articles.summary: SeaBird is a new 3D detection method that excels at recognizing large objects where traditional monocular detectors falter.

articles.title: CAN AI IDENTIFY UNSOLVABLE PROBLEMS?
articles.summary: This project introduces the concept of Unsolvable Problem Detection (UPD) in Vision Language Models, a new test to see if AI can identify when a problem can't be solved.

articles.title: ACTION SPOTTING IN SOCCER
articles.summary: ASTRA is a Transformer-based model that is capable of identifying key moments during soccer matches and overcoming challenges like action localization and data imbalance.

articles.title: WHEN WILL THE GENAI BUBBLE BURST?
articles.summary: That Generative AI may turn out to be a disappointment. There are concerns about the technology's lack of profitability, security issues, and the inherent problem of hallucinations in language models. Unless a groundbreaking model like GPT-5 is released by the end of 2024, addressing key issues and offering a killer application, the hype surrounding Generative AI may start to dissipate.

articles.title: WORLDCOIN FOUNDATION OPEN SOURCES CORE COMPONENTS OF THE ORB’S SOFTWARE
articles.summary: Tools for Humanity has developed a secure and powerful computing environment for the Worldcoin Orb that utilizes NVIDIA Jetson for processing and Arm Cortex M4 microcontrollers for real-time functions. The Orb runs Rust applications and uses NVIDIA's TensorRT for neural network inference. It is powered by a custom security-focused GNU/Linux distribution called Orb OS. The system integrates a secure element for cryptography and supports trusted execution environments for backend authentication.

articles.title: INSIDE THE SHADOWY GLOBAL BATTLE TO TAME THE WORLD’S MOST DANGEROUS TECHNOLOGY
articles.summary: This article delves into the complex international efforts to regulate AI, regarded as one of the most potent and risky technologies in modern times.

articles.title: GOOGLE MIGHT MAKE SGE A PAID FEATURE
articles.summary: Google is reportedly considering making the Search Generative Experience (SGE), which has been available through Search Labs for nearly a year, a paid feature as part of its Google One AI Premium subscription.

articles.title: BLUEDOT 1.1 (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Generate follow-up emails from Google Meet.

articles.title: AI INFRASTRUCTURE EXPLAINED
articles.summary: AI infrastructure, underpinned by GPUs, specialized software, and cloud services, is essential for the deployment and scaling of AI technologies.
